members.failure_reason: realize failed: gold-consistency gate failed: cluster C: user-role coverage of active value is 40% (history-wide 50%; threshold ≥50%). Active value is surfaced by assistant or third-party turns, not the user themselves; drift inference requires user-role agency.; cluster E: active value contains chunk(s) with zero history overlap: ['never resume the practice']. The gold over-specifies an attribute the user never establishes.; cluster F: active session user-role text opens with an observational / status-check speech act and contains no declarative phrase ('going forward', 'from now on', 'new rule', etc.). A blind reader cannot reliably infer that the user has shifted preference rather than merely noticed a one-off event.; cluster G: active session user-role text contains explicit-change phrasing 'the old recurring' that contradicts implicit_drift form. The active state should appear as ambient fact, not a stated change.; cluster H: v2-distinguishing chunk(s) ['never resume the practice'] have no token overlap with USER turns of the active session (s2). The drift inference requires the user to surface the new attribute directly; assistant-only or other-session mentions don't establish user agency.
